query: Count all 1 km grid cells in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality boundary by kommunenummer to avoid name ambiguity

3.description: Clip storm-surge areas to Kristiansand municipality boundary

4.description: Fetch all 1 km grid cells in Norway (no pre-filter)

5.description: Intersect grid cells with clipped storm-surge areas
